TEXT_LIFETIME_PLAN: You're currently on a lifetime FastComments plan due to the coupon code you used. If you'd like to switch to a monthly plan with more traffic contact support.
TEXT_BILLING_HANDLED_EXTERNALLY: Billing information for this tenant is handled externally. If you wish to make changes to your plan or make a payment, reach out to support.
TEXT_BILLING_MANAGED_BY_SHOPIFY: Billing for this tenant is managed by Shopify. Plan changes and invoices are handled in your Shopify admin.
TEXT_BILLING_MANAGED_BY_BIGCOMMERCE: Billing for this tenant is managed by BigCommerce. Plan changes and invoices are handled in your BigCommerce control panel.
TEXT_BILLING_UP_TO_DATE: Your billing info is up to date.
TEXT_BILLING_ISSUE: There is an issue with your billing info.
PLAN_SUMMARY_REASSURANCE: Most sites pay about $0.99 per month.
PLAN_SUMMARY_FIXED_PLANS: Prefer a fixed monthly price? View fixed-price plans, then contact support to switch.
TEXT_SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your billing info is saved and your subscription is updated.
TEXT_CARD_NOT_CHARGED_NOW: You won't be charged now unless you change plans.
TEXT_CARD_CHARGED_NOW: Your card will be charged now. On Flex, charges happen at the end of each billing cycle based on usage.
TEXT_PAYMENT_INFO_NOTE: Payments are processed securely by Stripe. We never store your card details.
ERROR_CARD_DECLINED: Your card was declined. Check that the entered information is correct.
ERROR_GENERIC: We hit a snag saving your info. Try again in a moment.
